integrity.note: Run 'sha256sum -c docs/research/SHA256SUMS.txt' from repo root to verify all artifacts

status_vocabulary.supported: Claim is backed by data meeting the stated acceptance criterion
status_vocabulary.supported_with_caveat: Claim is backed by data, but one or more sub-metrics are weak or ambiguous (see caveat field)
status_vocabulary.partially_supported: Claim is met under some counting rules but not others; rule sensitivity is documented
status_vocabulary.borderline: Observed metric is near but outside the stated acceptance threshold; non-divergent behavior observed
status_vocabulary.demonstrated: Platform or infrastructure capability verified by successful execution (not a scientific claim)
status_vocabulary.assumed_not_verified: Claim is assumed based on architectural reasoning but lacks direct measurement; verification protocol specified

claims.caveat: Pack III α-fit non-diagnostic (R² = 0.062); classified by bounded χ behavior

claims.statement: Universality k = 1 (gap statistic selects single cluster)
claims.caveat: Small sample size (20 domains, 6 with complexity sweeps)

claims.statement: Conjecture B behavior in Pack III extreme pulse widths (q ≈ 1.7)
Pack VI rank growth remains polylogarithmic (q ≈ 2.22)
claims.caveat: Exceeds strict q ≤ 2 threshold; predicted rank still < 25 at n_bits = 14

claims.statement: Grid independence at configuration level: 36/44 pass (81.8%)
Grid independence at pack level: 16/20 strict, ≥18/20 lenient
claims.caveat: Depends on counting rule for packs with mixed pass/fail configs
claims.counting_rule: Pack passes lenient if majority of its (pack, ξ) configurations pass |b|/a < 0.05 and no configuration exhibits monotonic rank divergence across all tested n_bits values

claims.statement: Campaign infrastructure fully operational: 514 measurements, 0 failures, structured outputs

artifacts.description: Deep sweep on Packs III and VI (162 entries, n_bits 4–9)

entry_points.command: PYTHONPATH="$PWD:$PYTHONPATH" python3 scripts/research/rank_atlas_campaign.py --packs ALL --n-bits 4 5 6 7 --n-complexity 5 --n-trials 2 --output rank_atlas_20pack.json --output-dir atlas_results_20pack

entry_points.description: Deep sweep on Packs III and VI
entry_points.command: PYTHONPATH="$PWD:$PYTHONPATH" python3 scripts/research/rank_atlas_campaign.py --packs III VI --n-bits 4 5 6 7 8 9 --n-complexity 8 --n-trials 3 --output rank_atlas_deep_III_VI.json --output-dir atlas_results_deep_III_VI
